title: Growing Success Natural Power Bug Stop 800ml RTU
features: For Aphids, Whitefly, Greenfly, Mealybugs, Spider Mite and more.
description: Growing Success Bug Stop is a pesticide-free alternative to help prevent bugs on fruits, vegetables and flowers as well as ornamental plants. Its formulation contains natural ingredients and will not harm beneficial insects such as bees and ladybirds. It works by promoting a plant reaction to defend itself against a wide range of pests such as Aphids, Whitefly, Greenfly, Mealybugs and more
